results.title: Rebel Wilson's ex-boyfriend relives the night she lost her virginity at 35 in awkward Broadway moment
results.description: Rebel Wilson's deeply personal revelation about losing her virginity at the age of 35 has been thrust back into the spotlight.

results.title: Love Island USA embroiled in another racism scandal as video of bombshell allegedly using slur surfaces just hours after her arrival
results.description: Love Island USA has found itself in controversy once again as a video of bombshell Alannah Keyser allegedly using a racial slur recently resurfaced.

results.title: Rod Stewart Pauses Utah Performance After Experiencing Onstage Health Scare
results.description: British singer-songwriter Rod Stewart performs after accepting the Lifetime Achievement Award on stage during the 51st American Music Awards at the Fontainebleau in Las Vegas on May 26, 2025. (Robyn Beck / AFP via Getty Images)

results.title: Amber Heard celebrates her first 10k with adorable photos with her daughter: 'First race glow'
results.description: Amber Heard just completed her first race in Madrid, sharing photos alongside her eldest daughter, Oonagh.

results.title: Nancy Guthrie: 2nd note sent to media indicates 8-year-old has died, NBC reports
results.description: NBC News is reported that a second note was sent to the media after the kidnapping of Nancy Guthrie, indicating that she had died. The mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie was reported missing earlier this year after disappearing from her Tucson-area home.
